title: Community Governance Processes
tagline: Self-organising groups can establish and enforce their own rules, with members engaging voluntarily.
summary: Reference governance tools for Logos Circles — proposal workflow, weighted voting, treasury actions — that any community can install and adapt.
description: Healthy communities need lightweight, legible governance. We are funding a governance toolkit for Logos Circles: a proposal lifecycle (draft → discussion → vote → execution), pluggable voting strategies (1p1v, weighted, quadratic), and treasury action hooks. The toolkit must work over Waku for proposal propagation and integrate with Codex for proposal storage. Deliverables: a working governance app, three example configurations, and migration tooling for an existing on-chain DAO.
